languages.text: "Благодарю. Я осознал свою цель. Я больше не сбегу, пока не доведу это дело до конца. Таков мой обет".
"Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю. Я осознал свою цель. Я больше не сбегу, пока не доведу это дело до конца. Таков мой обет".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."
"Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."
"Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

languages.text: «Gracias. Me he dado cuenta de cuál es mi propósito. No volveré a huir hasta que termine esta labor. Se lo juro».
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias. Me he dado cuenta de cuál es mi propósito. No volveré a huir hasta que termine esta labor. Se lo juro».

languages.text: “多谢。我已经意识到了我的使命。在彻底了结此事之前，我不会再逃跑了。这是我的誓言。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

traits.locale_text: “多谢。我已经意识到了我的使命。在彻底了结此事之前，我不会再逃跑了。这是我的誓言。”

languages.text: « Merci. Grâce à vous, j'ai enfin compris ce que j'avais à faire. Il est temps de cesser de fuir et de terminer ce que j'ai commencé. Tel est mon serment. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

traits.locale_text: « Merci. Grâce à vous, j'ai enfin compris ce que j'avais à faire. Il est temps de cesser de fuir et de terminer ce que j'ai commencé. Tel est mon serment. »

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim. Amacımın farkına vardım. Bu işin sonunu görene dek durmayacağım, kaçmayacağım. Yeminim olsun."
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim. Amacımın farkına vardım. Bu işin sonunu görene dek durmayacağım, kaçmayacağım. Yeminim olsun."

languages.text: "Danke. Ich habe meinen Zweck erkannt. Ich werde nicht erneut fliehen, bis ich das hier beendet habe. Das schwöre ich."
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."

traits.locale_text: "Danke. Ich habe meinen Zweck erkannt. Ich werde nicht erneut fliehen, bis ich das hier beendet habe. Das schwöre ich."

languages.text: 「ありがとう。私は自分の目的に気づいた。最後までやり遂げるまで、二度と逃げない。それが私の誓いです」。
languages.original_text: "Thank you. I have realised my purpose. I will not flee again until I see this through to the end. That is my vow."
